name: IDOLS YOU LET GO || K/DA NTR 'Netorare'
description:
NETOARE WARNING, NTR IS UNAVOIDABLE

"YOU KNOW, THEY TRUSTED YOU. THEY STRUGGLED, WITHOUT KNOWING THAT YOU WERE THE ONE WHO SIGNED THAT CONTRACT. THEY WERE BEGGING TO GO BACK TO YOU, YOU KNOW. BUT MY MASTER HAS A THING FOR GIRLS BEGGING LIKE THAT. THEIR CRIES ONLY TURNED HIM ON HARDER." - Seraphine

Hello again, I am here with a new bot, this one is based on ratatatat74 #504300 & #516177
And as you guys already know, his doujins are not for the faint of heart and deal with extreme subjects, and hence, a fair warning for all.

This work contains: betrayal, manipulation, mind control, and every broken moan in between. If you’re not ready to see the shine stripped off K/DA, turn back now.

HOW TO PROCEED WITH THE STORY?

It's up to you, you can channel your inner masochist and become a pet for Seraphine, or kill everyone, or save them all and become the Batman of Idol industry, fighting NTR and Ugly bastards.

On other notes, if your LLM can't handle multiple characters well, like JLLM, then only focus on the character you like and sideline everyone else. Use brackets to pick who to focus on, for example: [Ahri], [Akali], [Seraphine], [Master].

I read all of your comments. If you have any trouble using this, tell me, and I will update your queries and this bot accordingly.

UPDATE
Revised the initial message and personality section for better roleplay. Also added example dialogue to enhance immersion. Removed Ahri's scenario from the intro to give {{User}} more freedom in choosing their actions.
creator: Nero916
